requirement_topic.en: Singapore Grid Connection — 230/400 V / 50 Hz and EMA Electrical Installation Rules
requirement_topic.zh: 新加坡并网接入——230/400 V / 50 Hz及能源市场管理局电气安装规则
requirement_topic.zht: 新加坡併網接入——230/400 V / 50 Hz及能源市場管理局電氣安裝規則

summary.en: Singapore operates on a 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase, 50 Hz grid. All electrical installations, including EV charger wiring and connections to the distribution system, must comply with the Singapore Standard SS 638 (Code of Practice for Electrical Installations) and be carried out by a Licensed Electrical Worker (LEW) holding an EMA-issued licence. The Energy Market Authority (EMA) licenses electrical workers and regulates electrical installations under the Electricity Act (Cap. 89A). AC chargers are typically rated up to 22 kW three-phase; DC fast chargers can be rated at 50 kW or higher, subject to TNB / SP Group supply-capacity confirmation. Harmonic injection, power-factor, and power-quality limits consistent with IEC 61000 apply. EV charger installations connected to the LTA EV Common Charger Grant programme must additionally comply with LTA's published technical specifications.
summary.zh: 新加坡采用230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz电网。所有电气安装，包括电动汽车充电桩布线及与配电系统的连接，须符合新加坡标准SS 638（电气安装实务守则），并由持有能源市场管理局（EMA）颁发执照的持牌电气工人（LEW）执行。EMA依据《电力法》（Cap. 89A）对电气工人发牌并监管电气安装。交流充电桩通常额定功率不超过22 kW三相；直流快充额定功率可达50 kW或以上，须经SP Group供电容量确认。谐波注入、功率因数及电能质量限值须符合IEC 61000要求。接入陆路交通管理局电动汽车公共充电桩资助计划（EV Common Charger Grant）的充电桩安装，还须符合LTA发布的技术规格。
summary.zht: 新加坡採用230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz電網。所有電氣安裝，包括電動汽車充電樁佈線及與配電系統的連接，須符合新加坡標準SS 638（電氣安裝實務守則），並由持有能源市場管理局（EMA）頒發執照的持牌電氣工人（LEW）執行。EMA依據《電力法》（Cap. 89A）對電氣工人發牌並監管電氣安裝。交流充電樁通常額定功率不超過22 kW三相；直流快充額定功率可達50 kW或以上，須經SP Group供電容量確認。諧波注入、功率因數及電能質量限值須符合IEC 61000要求。接入陸路交通管理局電動汽車公共充電樁資助計劃（EV Common Charger Grant）的充電樁安裝，還須符合LTA發布的技術規格。

standards_or_laws: Electricity Act (Cap. 89A) — Singapore electrical installation licensing
SS 638 — Code of Practice for Electrical Installations (Singapore Standard)
EMA Licensed Electrical Worker (LEW) licensing requirements
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality
LTA EV Common Charger Grant technical specifications (lta.gov.sg)

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are accepted under GB/T 18487.1-2023 design evidence, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC systems, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China domestic supply is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. Singapore's 230 V / 400 V supply requires confirmation of input-voltage range and transformer or rectifier ratings. The 50 Hz frequency is identical to China's domestic grid. EMA LEW installation and SS 638 compliance replace China's domestic electrician licensing and GB installation code requirements.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装依据GB/T 18487.1-2023设计证据、GB/T 20234接口、直流系统GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收。中国国内供电为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。新加坡230 V / 400 V供电要求确认输入电压范围及变压器或整流器额定值。50 Hz频率与中国国内电网相同。EMA持牌电气工人安装要求和SS 638合规取代了中国国内电工持牌及GB安装规范要求。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝依據GB/T 18487.1-2023設計證據、GB/T 20234接口、直流系統GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收。中國國內供電為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。新加坡230 V / 400 V供電要求確認輸入電壓範圍及變壓器或整流器額定值。50 Hz頻率與中國國內電網相同。EMA持牌電氣工人安裝要求和SS 638合規取代了中國國內電工持牌及GB安裝規範要求。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) input-voltage range of the charger covers 230 V single-phase / 400 V three-phase at 50 Hz; (2) all on-site installation is carried out by an EMA Licensed Electrical Worker; (3) installation documentation complies with SS 638 and is submitted to EMA where required; (4) harmonics, power-factor, and EMC performance meet IEC 61000 limits for Singapore's grid; (5) for LTA grant-funded installations, the charger model and installation meet LTA's published EV Common Charger Grant technical specifications. China domestic 220 V / 380 V design without input-voltage-range confirmation must be re-verified for Singapore's 230 V / 400 V supply.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩输入电压范围覆盖230 V单相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 所有现场安装由EMA持牌电气工人执行；(3) 安装文件符合SS 638，并在要求时提交至EMA；(4) 谐波、功率因数及电磁兼容性能符合新加坡电网IEC 61000限值；(5) 对于LTA资助的安装，充电桩型号及安装须符合LTA发布的电动汽车公共充电桩资助计划技术规格。未经输入电压范围确认的中国国内220 V / 380 V设计，须重新核实是否适用于新加坡230 V / 400 V供电。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁輸入電壓範圍覆蓋230 V單相 / 400 V三相、50 Hz；(2) 所有現場安裝由EMA持牌電氣工人執行；(3) 安裝文件符合SS 638，並在要求時提交至EMA；(4) 諧波、功率因數及電磁兼容性能符合新加坡電網IEC 61000限值；(5) 對於LTA資助的安裝，充電樁型號及安裝須符合LTA發布的電動汽車公共充電樁資助計劃技術規格。未經輸入電壓範圍確認的中國國內220 V / 380 V設計，須重新核實是否適用於新加坡230 V / 400 V供電。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMA Licensed Electrical Worker installation and SS 638 compliance are required by law for all electrical installations in Singapore; LTA technical specifications are mandatory for EV Common Charger Grant-funded chargers
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not an EMA or LTA approval substitute; voltage confirmation is required for Singapore's 230/400 V supply

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Singapore-ready charger installation requires EMA Licensed Electrical Worker installation, SS 638 compliance, input-voltage confirmation for 230/400 V, and IEC 61000 EMC evidence. For LTA grant-funded sites, confirm LTA EV Common Charger Grant technical specifications separately.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向新加坡的充电桩安装须由EMA持牌电气工人执行，符合SS 638，确认230/400 V输入电压，并提供IEC 61000电磁兼容证据。对于LTA资助场所，应另行确认LTA电动汽车公共充电桩资助计划技术规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向新加坡的充電樁安裝須由EMA持牌電氣工人執行，符合SS 638，確認230/400 V輸入電壓，並提供IEC 61000電磁兼容證據。對於LTA資助場所，應另行確認LTA電動汽車公共充電樁資助計劃技術規格。
